content:
Users can only access the rooms they are invited to by admins. They can't create own rooms, folders or files.
<1>In {{agentSection}}: can view the {{aiAgent}} results and shared chats if they were invited, but cannot create chats or modify the knowledge base.

comment.text: This is a description of the "New User" role, explaining their limited permissions within DocSpace and AI Agent features. It appears in user role selection interfaces. The `{{agentSection}}` variable is the localized name for the AI Agents section, and `{{aiAgent}}` is the localized name for the AI Agent feature. The `<1>` tag bolds the text within it.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The English text contains 'In {{agentSection}}' within the bold tag <1>In {{agentSection}}</1>, but the Azerbaijani translation only has '{{agentSection}}' within <1>{{agentSection}}</1>. The word 'In' (or its Azerbaijani equivalent) is missing, which is important for establishing the context/location.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: <1>{{agentSection}}-də</1>: dəvət olundularsa, {{aiAgent}} nəticələrini və paylaşılmış söhbətləri görə bilərlər, lakin söhbət yarada və ya bilik bazasını dəyişdirə bilməzlər.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: English text 'In' appears untranslated within the Japanese translation. The phrase '<1>In {{agentSection}}</1>' mixes English into the Japanese text, which should be fully translated to Japanese.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion:
Change '<1>In {{agentSection}}' to '<1>{{agentSection}}では' or '<1>{{agentSection}}内では' to properly translate the English preposition into Japanese. Full corrected text: 'ユーザーは、管理者から招待されたルームのみにアクセスできます。自身でルーム、フォルダ、またはファイルを作成することはできません。
<1>{{agentSection}}では: 招待された場合、{{aiAgent}}の結果と共有チャットを閲覧できますが、チャットの作成やナレッジベースの変更はできません。'

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'In' appears before {{agentSection}} in the English text (within the <1> bold tags) but is missing from the Korean translation. English has '<1>In {{agentSection}}</1>' while Korean has '<1>{{agentSection}}</1>'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion:
사용자는 관리자가 초대하는 방에만 접근할 수 있습니다. 자체적으로 방, 폴더 또는 파일을 생성할 수 없습니다.
<1>{{agentSection}}에: 초대된 경우 {{aiAgent}} 결과 및 공유 채팅을 볼 수 있지만, 채팅을 생성하거나 지식 기반을 수정할 수는 없습니다.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'In' (or its Sinhala equivalent) is missing from inside the <1> tag. English has '<1>In {{agentSection}}</1>' but Sinhala only has '<1>{{agentSection}}</1>'. This changes the meaning by removing the locative context indicator.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: <1>{{agentSection}} හි</1>: ඔවුන්ට ආරාධනා කර ඇත්නම්, {{aiAgent}} ප්‍රතිඵල සහ බෙදාගත් chats නැරඹිය හැකි නමුත්, chats නිර්මාණය කිරීමට හෝ දැනුම පදනම සංශෝධනය කිරීමට නොහැකිය.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'In' is left in English within the Turkish translation. This breaks the Turkish localization and should be translated to Turkish, such as using the locative case suffix.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion:
Kullanıcılar yalnızca yöneticiler tarafından davet edildikleri odalara erişebilirler. Kendi odalarını, klasörlerini veya dosyalarını oluşturamazlar.
<1>{{agentSection}}'de: davet edildilerse {{aiAgent}} sonuçlarını ve paylaşılan sohbetleri görüntüleyebilir, ancak sohbet oluşturamaz veya bilgi tabanını düzenleyemez.
